We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 4.88s, d = 184.0m:
t^2 = 4.88 * 4.88:
4.88 * 0.08 = 0.3904
4.88 * 0.80 = 3.9040
4.88 * 4.00 = 19.5200
0.3904 + 3.9040 = 4.2944
4.2944 + 19.5200 = 23.8144
k = 184.0 / 4.88^2 = 184.0 / 23.8144 = 184.000 / 23.814
= 0 + 1 * 184000 / 23814
= 1 + 1 * 160186 / 23814
= 2 + 1 * 136372 / 23814
= 3 + 1 * 112558 / 23814
= 4 + 1 * 88744 / 23814
= 5 + 1 * 64930 / 23814
= 6 + 1 * 41116 / 23814
= 7 + 1 * 17302 / 23814
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 173020 / 23814
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 149206 / 23814
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 125392 / 23814
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 101578 / 23814
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 77764 / 23814
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 53950 / 23814
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 30136 / 23814
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 6322 / 23814
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 63220 / 23814
= 7.71 + 0.01 * 39406 / 23814
= 7.72 + 0.01 * 15592 / 23814
= 7.720 + 0.001 * 155920 / 23814
= 7.721 + 0.001 * 132106 / 23814
= 7.722 + 0.001 * 108292 / 23814
= 7.723 + 0.001 * 84478 / 23814
= 7.724 + 0.001 * 60664 / 23814
= 7.725 + 0.001 * 36850 / 23814
= 7.726 + 0.001 * 13036 / 23814
= 7.726

t = 1.47s, d = 16.7m:
t^2 = 1.47 * 1.47:
1.47 * 0.07 = 0.1029
1.47 * 0.40 = 0.5880
1.47 * 1.00 = 1.4700
0.1029 + 0.5880 = 0.6909
0.6909 + 1.4700 = 2.1609
k = 16.7 / 1.47^2 = 16.7 / 2.1609 = 16.700 / 2.160
= 0 + 1 * 16700 / 2160
= 1 + 1 * 14540 / 2160
= 2 + 1 * 12380 / 2160
= 3 + 1 * 10220 / 2160
= 4 + 1 * 8060 / 2160
= 5 + 1 * 5900 / 2160
= 6 + 1 * 3740 / 2160
= 7 + 1 * 1580 / 2160
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 15800 / 2160
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 13640 / 2160
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 11480 / 2160
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 9320 / 2160
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 7160 / 2160
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 5000 / 2160
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 2840 / 2160
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 680 / 2160
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 6800 / 2160
= 7.71 + 0.01 * 4640 / 2160
= 7.72 + 0.01 * 2480 / 2160
= 7.73 + 0.01 * 320 / 2160
= 7.730 + 0.001 * 3200 / 2160
= 7.731 + 0.001 * 1040 / 2160
= 7.731

t = 1.54s, d = 18.32m:
t^2 = 1.54 * 1.54:
1.54 * 0.04 = 0.0616
1.54 * 0.50 = 0.7700
1.54 * 1.00 = 1.5400
0.0616 + 0.7700 = 0.8316
0.8316 + 1.5400 = 2.3716
k = 18.32 / 1.54^2 = 18.32 / 2.3716 = 18.320 / 2.371
= 0 + 1 * 18320 / 2371
= 1 + 1 * 15949 / 2371
= 2 + 1 * 13578 / 2371
= 3 + 1 * 11207 / 2371
= 4 + 1 * 8836 / 2371
= 5 + 1 * 6465 / 2371
= 6 + 1 * 4094 / 2371
= 7 + 1 * 1723 / 2371
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 17230 / 2371
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 14859 / 2371
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 12488 / 2371
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 10117 / 2371
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 7746 / 2371
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 5375 / 2371
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 3004 / 2371
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 633 / 2371
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 6330 / 2371
= 7.71 + 0.01 * 3959 / 2371
= 7.72 + 0.01 * 1588 / 2371
= 7.720 + 0.001 * 15880 / 2371
= 7.721 + 0.001 * 13509 / 2371
= 7.722 + 0.001 * 11138 / 2371
= 7.723 + 0.001 * 8767 / 2371
= 7.724 + 0.001 * 6396 / 2371
= 7.725 + 0.001 * 4025 / 2371
= 7.726 + 0.001 * 1654 / 2371
= 7.726

k values: 7.726, 7.731, 7.726
k values (sorted): 7.726, 7.726, 7.731
The median k is 7.726.

For t = 4.13:
t^2 = 4.13 * 4.13:
4.13 * 0.03 = 0.1239
4.13 * 0.10 = 0.4130
4.13 * 4.00 = 16.5200
0.1239 + 0.4130 = 0.5369
0.5369 + 16.5200 = 17.0569
= 17.0569

d = 7.726 * 17.0569:
7.726 * 0.0009 = 0.0069534
7.726 * 0.0060 = 0.0463560
7.726 * 0.0500 = 0.3863000
7.726 * 7.0000 = 54.0820000
7.726 * 10.0000 = 77.2600000
0.0069534 + 0.0463560 = 0.0533094
0.0533094 + 0.3863000 = 0.4396094
0.4396094 + 54.0820000 = 54.5216094
54.5216094 + 77.2600000 = 131.7816094
= 131.781

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{131.781}
